sources.title: Torrent 1926
sources.channelName: Public Domain Movies - Classic Old Movies

metadata.Plot: A young girl and her father are kicked out of their house by a cruel noblewoman, and the girl's heart is broken when her sweetheart, the noblewoman's son, won't go to Paris with them. After becoming an opera star in Paris, the girl returns to her homeland and finds her romance with the nobleman rekindled.
metadata.Writer: Vicente Blasco Ibáñez, Dorothy Farnum, Katherine Hilliker
metadata.Actors: Ricardo Cortez, Greta Garbo, Gertrude Olmstead
